2605.25168.title: Methodology for Creating a Clinically Verified Dermoscopic Image Dataset
2605.25168.paper_summary: This study presents a methodology for constructing a clinically verified dataset of dermatoscopic images for medical informatics research. The relevance of the work is driven by the fact that the performance of automated diagnostic support systems depends not only on the volume of images, but also on the reproducibility of the image acquisition procedure, the completeness of structured metadata, and the reliability of diagnostic labels. International collections were primarily created under conditions that differ substantially from routine Russian outpatient practice and mobile dermatoscopy. The proposed methodology integrates three interconnected components: (1) a standard operating procedure (SOP) for acquiring images via mobile dermatoscopy, (2) an information model comprising 16 structured metadata fields organized into six clinically oriented blocks in ISIC-compatible notation, and (3) a multi-stage expert verification of diagnostic labels (initial clinical annotation, consensus review by three specialists, and histological confirmation of all malignant neoplasms). Using this methodology, a dataset of 1,026 unique dermatoscopic images from 443 patients was collected between June 2025 and May 2026. From 1,044 initial records, 18 duplicates were excluded. The dataset includes nine nosological categories; all 39 malignant lesions (18 melanomas, 15 basal cell carcinomas, and 6 squamous cell carcinomas) were histologically verified. Patient age ranged from 2 to 90 years (median 38), with 279 females (63%) and 164 males (37%). Each image is accompanied by expert-annotated dermatoscopic structures and an explicit verification_stage field indicating the level of diagnostic confirmation. The resulting dataset serves as a pilot clinically verified resource suitable for independent model evaluation, domain shift analysis, interpretability studies, and further expansion.
2605.25168.paper_summary_zh: 這項研究提出了一種構建臨床驗證的皮膚鏡圖像數據集的方法，旨在用於醫學資訊學研究。該工作的相關性源於自動診斷支持系統的性能不僅取決於圖像的數量，還取決於圖像獲取程序的可重複性、結構化元數據的完整性以及診斷標籤的可靠性。國際數據集主要是在與俄羅斯日常門診實踐和移動皮膚鏡檢查有顯著不同的條件下創建的。所提出的方法論整合了三個相互關聯的組件：（1）通過移動皮膚鏡獲取圖像的標準操作程序（SOP），（2）包含16個結構化元數據字段的信息模型，這些字段以ISIC兼容的標註組織成六個臨床導向的區塊，以及（3）對診斷標籤的多階段專家驗證（初步臨床註釋、三位專家的共識審查以及所有惡性腫瘤的組織學確認）。使用這一方法論，於2025年6月至2026年5月期間收集了來自443名患者的1,026幅獨特皮膚鏡圖像。在1,044條初始記錄中，排除了18條重複記錄。該數據集包括九個病理類別；所有39個惡性病變（18個黑色素瘤、15個基底細胞癌和6個鱗狀細胞癌）均經過組織學驗證。患者年齡範圍從2歲到90歲（中位數38歲），其中279名女性（63%）和164名男性（37%）。每幅圖像都附有專家註釋的皮膚鏡結構和一個明確的verification_stage字段，指示診斷確認的級別。最終生成的數據集作為一個試點臨床驗證資源，適合用於獨立模型評估、領域轉移分析、可解釋性研究和進一步擴展。
2605.25168.author: Kozachok Elena Sergeevna et.al.
